introSection: Super Loop was a steel roller coaster located at Izmir Fuari in Izmir, İzmir, Turkey.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This roller coaster was a ZL50 installation, of which only two are known to have been built. It has a single vertical loop, which is a similar size to that of the smaller, more popular ZL42. However, this roller coaster has wider turns and a long straight section.

fullText:
Super Loop was a steel roller coaster located at Izmir Fuari in Izmir, İzmir, Turkey.

This roller coaster was a ZL50 installation, of which only two are known to have been built. It has a single vertical loop, which is a similar size to that of the smaller, more popular ZL42. However, this roller coaster has wider turns and a long straight section.
